## Type

- [ ] `feat:` New skill / agent / command / prompt
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation
- [ ] `refactor:` Restructuring
- [ ] `chore:` Build / CI / tooling

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] Ran `python3 .agent/scripts/validate_skills.py`
- [ ] Rebuilt index: `python3 .agent/scripts/generate_index.py`
- [ ] Installed locally: `claude plugin add ./`

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Style Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md#style-guide)
- [ ] Updated `ARCHITECTURE.md` (if new components added)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Evidence tags on all claims
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
